name: Fried Fragrant Bells
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pork, green onions, ginger, chicken broth, dark soy sauce, dry sherry, and egg in a bowl and mix well.
2. In a small bowl, combine the remaining cornstarch with water.
3. Moisten one bean curd sheet under running water. Place it on the work surface and spread it thinly.
4. Spread 1/4 of the meat mixture over the bean curd sheet. Roll as for a jelly roll, brushing the long edge with dissolved cornstarch to seal.
5. Repeat steps 3-4 to make three more rolls.
6. Cut each roll into slices that are 1 1/2 inches thick. Dip each end in additional cornstarch to seal the filling (this step can be done up to 4 hours ahead and then refrigerated).
7. For the salt mixture, combine salt and Szechwan peppercorns in a small skillet and cook until browned. Crush them in a mortar with a pestle.
8. Heat oil in a wok or deep fryer to 375°F (190°C). Add slices a few at a time and fry until crisp. Drain on paper towels.
9. Serve hot with Szechwan peppercorn salt, if desired.
